text: HAIFA: 2 confirmed dead, 2 still missing under rubble from overnight Iranian missile strike on residential building. 24 wounded. Cluster bomb missiles also hit Petah Tikva (woman serious) and Haifa (4 light).

LEBANON: Israeli strikes kill 7 in Kfar Hatta (incl. 4yo girl, soldier), 4 killed near Beirut hospital in Jnah (39 wounded). Masnaa border crossing (Lebanon-Syria) forced closed. Hezbollah claims cruise missile hit on warship — IDF denies.

DAY 38 AM: Haifa 2 dead/2 missing; cluster bombs Petah Tikva+Haifa; Lebanon 11 killed; Hezbollah warship claim (IDF denies); IRGC 'new Gulf order'; Iran rejects Trump deadline; Masnaa crossing closed; OPEC+ +206k bpd; Brent $110.82/WTI $112.00; gas $4.10; April 7 deadline TOMORROW

ASSASSINATION: Israel kills IRGC Intelligence Chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi + Quds Force Unit 840 commander Asghar Bagheri in dawn Tehran strike — IRGC's No. 2 eliminated in major decapitation operation

SOUTH PARS DESTROYED: Israeli strikes obliterate Asaluyeh petrochemical complex — 5 killed, 170 injured. 85% of Iran's petrochemical exports now offline. Sharif University electronics research center also hit in Tehran.

CLUSTER ATTACK: Iranian cluster munitions hit Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak, Givatayim — 2 killed (elderly couple), 28+ bomblet impact sites across Tel Aviv suburbs. Haifa building collapse: all 4 missing confirmed dead after 18-hour rescue.

ISLAMABAD ACCORD: Egypt/Pakistan/Turkey submit 45-day ceasefire proposal to US + Iran. Phase 1: ceasefire + Hormuz reopening. Phase 2: permanent deal. Iran rejects temporary Hormuz opening. Pakistan FM Munir in overnight talks with VP Vance.

DAY 38 PM: Khademi+Bagheri killed in Tehran; South Pars petrochemical destroyed (5 dead, 170 hurt); Sharif Univ struck; cluster bombs kill 2 Ramat Gan; Haifa 4 dead; 45-day ceasefire proposal; Qatar LNG attempts Hormuz; Iraqi tanker exemption; IRGC claims USS Tripoli attack (unverified); Brent $110.82/WTI $111.54; gas $4.104; April 7 deadline TOMORROW

TRUMP PRESSER: "The entire country can be taken out in one night, and that night might be tomorrow night." Hormuz deadline extended to Tue Apr 7 8pm ET. Threatens Power Plant Day + Bridge Day. Called Iran offer "significant" but "not good enough."

DAY 38 EVE: Trump threatens to destroy all of Iran tomorrow; Araghchi refuses talks (CBS); Iran calls threats "sheer desperation"; Pope Leo Easter plea; EU sanctions 19 Iranian officials; Planet Labs imagery blackout; Brent $109.90/WTI $111.81; Gas $4.10; DEADLINE TOMORROW 8PM ET

RUSSIA-IRAN INTEL: Zelensky reveals Russia provided Iran satellite intelligence on 50-53 Israeli energy grid targets. Orot Rabin power station named primary target. Russia told Iran Israel is an 'energy island' — a few strikes could trigger total collapse.

BAB AL-MANDEB THREAT: Iranian adviser Velayati says 'Resistance front views Bab al-Mandeb as it does Hormuz.' If both straits closed, 25% of global energy supply blocked. JPMorgan: oil could hit $120-$150/barrel.

DAY 38 NIGHT: Russia-Iran intel sharing exposed; Bab al-Mandeb threat; Vance overnight talks on Islamabad Accord; Brent $111.25 (+39.3%)/WTI $110.13 (+45.8%); Gas $4.119; 455 Iranian attack waves since war began; DEADLINE TOMORROW 8PM ET
